title: ELK 1:1 Java->MoonBit Full Port
description: Direct transliteration port of Eclipse ELK with package-by-package task tracking. No compatibility shim; preserve upstream package boundaries and behavior.
notes: Started full 1:1 direct transliteration workflow. Package-level task tree created for all plugin and test packages.

title: Port package: org.eclipse.elk.alg.common
description: 1:1 direct port for org.eclipse.elk.alg.common from elk-reference/plugins/org.eclipse.elk.alg.common. Translate source and keep behavior parity.

comments.author: Milky2018
comments.text: Started direct transliteration coverage for org.eclipse.elk.alg.common core geometry helpers needed by convex-hull logic. Added Point and Quadrant model (alg_common_point.mbt), generic scanline scaffold (alg_common_compaction_scanline.mbt), and RectilinearConvexHull implementation (alg_common_rectilinear_convex_hull.mbt) translated from upstream with quadrant staircase construction and rectangle splitting behavior.

comments.author: Milky2018
comments.text: Completed a 1:1 translation batch for org.eclipse.elk.alg.common core geometry/structure utilities: ICostFunction, Tree, TEdge, TTriangle, BowyerWatsonTriangulation, NaiveMinST, plus utils/SVGImage, utils/UniqueTriple, utils/Utils, and spore internal constants. Added MoonBit tests in alg_common_triangulation_minst_test.mbt before implementation and aligned behavior to tests. Validation: moon check, moon test, moon info, moon fmt all pass (warnings only).

comments.author: Milky2018
comments.text: Ported org.eclipse.elk.alg.common.networksimplex 1:1 direct transliteration batch: NNode, NEdge, NGraph model + NetworkSimplex algorithm (feasible tree, cut values, exchange, normalize, balance, subtree prune/reattach). Added MoonBit API surface nnode_of/nedge_of/new_ngraph/network_simplex_for_graph and aligned generated mbti. Validation: moon check, moon test (201/201), moon info, moon fmt.

comments.author: Milky2018
comments.text: Ported org.eclipse.elk.alg.common.compaction.oned 1:1 direct transliteration batch: CGraph/CNode/CGroup model + OneDimensionalCompactor (direction transforms, constraint calc/reverse, group offsets) + constraint algorithms (quadratic, scanline) + LongestPathCompaction. Added new_spacings_handler to construct ISpacingsHandler from tests.

comments.author: Milky2018
comments.text: 2026-02-10: Continued direct transliteration for org.eclipse.elk.alg.common plugin. Added compaction.options enums (HighLevelSortingCriterion, LowLevelSortingCriterion, TraversalStrategy) and exposed them in package interface. Verification passed with moon check and full moon test.

comments.author: Milky2018
comments.text: 2026-02-10: Extended direct transliteration parity for compaction.oned CNode model: added toStringDelegate field/builder API, origin/type getters+setters, CNode::to_string, and CNode::get_debug_svg matching upstream debug representation semantics.

comments.author: Milky2018
comments.text: 2026-02-10: Ported org.eclipse.elk.alg.common.compaction.DebugUtil to MoonBit (draw_hitboxes) using direct SVG string generation from CGraph/CNode constraints; added alg_common_compaction_debug_util_test.mbt coverage to assert SVG/rect/constraint-line emission.

comments.author: Milky2018
comments.text: 2026-02-10: Continued 1:1 transliteration for org.eclipse.elk.alg.common overlaps package. Added RectangleStripOverlapRemover + RectangleNode model and GreedyRectangleStripOverlapRemover strategy, ported scanline overlap graph construction and direction-based coordinate import/export behavior, and added overlaps tests (downward/rightward/custom strategy). Direction values are sourced via direction_values() to match existing enum exposure semantics. Validation passed: moon test alg_common_overlaps_rectangle_strip_overlap_remover_test.mbt, moon check, moon test, moon info, moon fmt.

comments.author: Milky2018
comments.text: 2026-02-10: Added direct transliteration coverage for org.eclipse.elk.alg.common.spore.Node and ported behavior tests from upstream UtilsTest (underlap and direction-dependent distance checks). New files: alg_common_spore_node.mbt and alg_common_spore_node_test.mbt. Validation passed: moon test alg_common_spore_node_test.mbt, moon check, moon test, moon info, moon fmt.

comments.author: Milky2018
comments.text: 2026-02-10: Ported org.eclipse.elk.alg.common.spore.ScanlineOverlapCheck and IOverlapHandler with direct transliteration semantics (scanline timestamp ordering, sorted active-set insertion/removal, overlap callback dispatch, and optional SVG debug hooks). Added tests in alg_common_spore_scanline_overlap_check_test.mbt for expected overlap detection and touch-only exclusion. Validation passed: moon test alg_common_spore_scanline_overlap_check_test.mbt, moon check, moon test, moon info, moon fmt.

comments.author: Milky2018
comments.text: Ported org.eclipse.elk.alg.common.spore.DepthFirstCompaction with 1:1 control flow (recursive compaction, min-underlap computation, subtree translation, and optional SVG debug output). Added blackbox tests for non-orthogonal compaction, orthogonal axis behavior, and subtree translation. Verified with moon test alg_common_spore_depth_first_compaction_test.mbt, moon check, moon test, and moon info && moon fmt.

comments.author: Milky2018
comments.text: Aligned org.eclipse.elk.alg.common.overlaps IRectangleStripOverlapRemovalStrategy semantics closer to Java interface shape: replaced function-typed strategy slot with explicit strategy object plus remove_overlaps method/constructor, added default greedy strategy constructor wiring, and updated overlap remover custom-strategy test to use strategy objects. Validation: moon check, moon test alg_common_overlaps_rectangle_strip_overlap_remover_test.mbt, moon test, moon info && moon fmt.

comments.author: Milky2018
comments.text: Ported org.eclipse.elk.alg.common.polyomino.structures.IThreeValueGrid contract into MoonBit style interface object. Added new IThreeValueGrid API (constructor + method delegates), adapter constructor from existing TwoBitGrid, and contract tests covering adapter behavior and callback-based implementations. Validation: moon test alg_common_polyomino_structures_ithree_value_grid_test.mbt, moon check, moon test, moon info && moon fmt.

comments.author: Milky2018
comments.text: Ported org.eclipse.elk.alg.common.polyomino.structures.Direction as PolyominoDirection in MoonBit (flattened package naming), including is_horizontal semantics and exported polyomino_direction_values helper for blackbox access, mirroring existing enum exposure pattern used elsewhere in this module. Added direction behavior test. Validation: moon test alg_common_polyomino_structures_direction_test.mbt, moon check, moon test, moon info && moon fmt.

comments.author: Milky2018
comments.text: Ported org.eclipse.elk.alg.common.polyomino.structures.PlanarGrid and Polyomino with direct transliteration control flow: center-based coordinate mapping, weak/strong intersection semantics, area weak-block operations, filled-bounds extraction, addFilledCellsFrom for PlanarGrid and Polyomino (including extension handling and polyomino x/y updates), and Polyomino extension storage APIs. Added tests for center-based behavior, intersection semantics, fill precedence, bounds, and polyomino-extension weak blocking. Validation: moon test alg_common_polyomino_structures_planar_grid_test.mbt, moon test alg_common_polyomino_structures_ithree_value_grid_test.mbt, moon test alg_common_polyomino_structures_direction_test.mbt, moon check, moon test, moon info && moon fmt.

comments.author: Milky2018
comments.text: 2026-02-10: Completed direct port of org.eclipse.elk.alg.common.polyomino package internals in MoonBit: added ProfileFill/Polyominoes wiring, successor strategies (line-by-line, manhattan, jitter, max-norm, quadrants, combination), PolyominoCompactor, and behavior tests. Full validation: moon check, moon test (246 passed), moon info && moon fmt.

title: Port package: org.eclipse.elk.core
description: 1:1 direct port for org.eclipse.elk.core from elk-reference/plugins/org.eclipse.elk.core. Translate source and keep behavior parity.
notes:
Core package direct port in progress.
2026-02-08: Ported org.eclipse.elk.core.math (KVector, KVectorChain, ElkMath, BezierSpline, CubicSplineInterpolator, ElkRectangle, Spacing/ElkMargin/ElkPadding) into MoonBit with direct translation behavior.
2026-02-08: Ported org.eclipse.elk.core.alg (AlgorithmAssembler, LayoutProcessorConfiguration, ILayoutProcessor/Factory, ILayoutPhaseFactory alias, EnumBasedFactoryComparator) with direct-translation semantics. Added core util dependency classes AbstractRandomListAccessor and IElkProgressMonitor/IElkCancelIndicator skeleton used by alg path. Verified with moon check + moon info + moon fmt + moon test (86/86).
2026-02-08: Added direct translation of core util spacing path: ElkSpacings (ElkCoreSpacingsBuilder + withFactor/withValue/withOverwrite/toVisitor/apply semantics), IGraphElementVisitor, and ElkUtil.applyVisitors/translate behavior for content alignment. Added minimal CoreOptions property subset and typed property model required by core spacing utilities.
2026-02-08: Ported core.data DeprecatedLayoutOptionReplacer with direct behavior: replace deprecated PORT_LABELS_NEXT_TO_PORT_IF_POSSIBLE and migrate SPACE_EFFICIENT_PORT_LABELS to PORT_LABELS_PLACEMENT.
2026-02-08: Added direct-translation baseline for core runtime path needed by remaining core tests: LayoutConfigurator (class/element option merge + no-overwrite filter), LayoutAlgorithmData + LayoutMetaDataService minimal registry, LayoutAlgorithmResolver default/suffix resolution, RecursiveGraphLayoutEngine minimal recursive execution path, GraphValidator, LayoutOptionValidator, and BasicProgressMonitor alias. Extended core options (ALGORITHM/RESOLVED_ALGORITHM/NO_LAYOUT/INSIDE_SELF_LOOPS_ACTIVATE).
2026-02-09: RecursiveGraphLayoutEngine now assigns positive child coordinates and synthesizes single edge sections for simple connected node-node edges, enabling downstream JSON transfer parity checks.

comments.author: Milky2018
comments.text: Added direct option-enum translation coverage in core: expanded core_options_enums.mbt with Alignment/Direction/EdgeCoords/EdgeLabelPlacement/EdgeRouting/EdgeType/HierarchyHandling/LabelSide/NodeLabelPlacement/PortAlignment/PortConstraints/PortLabelPlacement/PortSide/ShapeCoords/SizeConstraint/SizeOptions/TopdownNodeTypes plus Java-parity helper methods (opposite/isHorizontal/isVertical/isValid/fixed/minimumSize/etc). Added exported value accessors for testability (direction_values, port_constraints_values, port_label_placement_values, port_side_values, node_label_placement_values, size_options_values).

comments.author: Milky2018
comments.text: Expanded core options property surface in core_options_core_options.mbt with direct ELK option ids: alignment, portConstraints, port.side, nodeLabels.placement, padding, priority, nodeSize.constraints, nodeSize.minimum, expandNodes. Extended layout_meta_data_service_register_default_options() to register these defaults and metadata entries.

comments.author: Milky2018
comments.text: Added metadata service parity utilities in core_data_layout_meta_data_service.mbt: layout_meta_data_service_option_data_values(), layout_meta_data_service_algorithm_data_values(), and layout_meta_data_service_get_option_data_by_suffix() with duplicate-suffix handling semantics mirroring algorithm lookup.

comments.author: Milky2018
comments.text: Continued direct translation for core.data content-assist semantics. Added LayoutAlgorithmData known-option support (add_known_option/knows_option/get_known_option_ids) and wired default algorithm metadata (fixed/box/random/layered) with known option IDs. Updated LayoutDataContentAssist to resolve responsible algorithm from element context and filter proposals by algorithm-known options + target visibility.

comments.author: Milky2018
comments.text: Extended LayoutDataContentAssist direct-translation coverage to include label elements. Added label-element target handling, element-level assigned-option checks for labels, and relevant-node resolution through recursive label-parent chains (label->label->node/edge/port).

comments.author: Milky2018
comments.text: Ported additional core.data artifacts: added LayoutCategoryData direct translation (id/name/description/layouters with add_layouter) and extended LayoutMetaDataService with category registry APIs (register/get/values + reset integration).

comments.author: Milky2018
comments.text: Ported additional foundational core API surface with direct-style translation: IGraphLayoutEngine, AbstractLayoutProvider, ITopdownLayoutProvider, UnsupportedConfigurationException/UnsupportedGraphException data types, GraphValidationException, IValidatingGraphElementVisitor, IDataObject, ExclusiveBounds (greaterThan/lessThan comparables), ISplineInterpolator adapter, and WrappedException.

comments.author: Milky2018
comments.text: Added NullElkProgressMonitor parity path by extending progress-monitor model with null-mode semantics and new_null_elk_progress_monitor() constructor. Null mode now matches Java no-op behavior for begin/log/logGraph/subTask while preserving existing behavior for regular monitors.

comments.author: Milky2018
comments.text: Stabilized core.data metadata-provider path after prior break: fixed registry construction call shape in layout_meta_data_service_registry(), kept provider registration hooks, and restored green build/test baseline before continuing package ports.

comments.author: Milky2018
comments.text: 2026-02-10: Extended core options parity surface with CoreOptions.OMIT_NODE_MICRO_LAYOUT as property id org.eclipse.elk.omitNodeMicroLayout in core_options_core_options.mbt, needed by direct translation of NodeMicroLayout tests.

title: Port package: org.eclipse.elk.graph
description: 1:1 direct port for org.eclipse.elk.graph from elk-reference/plugins/org.eclipse.elk.graph. Translate source and keep behavior parity.
notes:
Graph package direct port in progress.
2026-02-08: Extended graph model foundations used by core tests: node coordinates/dimensions, typed property stores (double/bool/string-set), descendant traversal, createSimpleEdge helper, and properties-skipping traversal helper.
2026-02-08: Extended graph model foundations for core validators/engine parity: node identifier support, string properties, contained-edge bookkeeping, edge connectivity predicate, and layout-option string assignment storage used by validation path.
2026-02-08: Extended graph properties core with clone-aware IProperty default semantics (clone callback + clone-required panic path), enabling upstream PropertyTest behavior parity checks.
2026-02-09: Extended graph core model with edge section support needed by json import/transfer parity: ElkEdgeSection type, section stores, section IDs, coordinates, shape refs, and incoming/outgoing section links, plus edge->sections bookkeeping.
2026-02-09: Expanded graph model section API: create_edge_section, edge_sections, section identifier/coordinates, incoming/outgoing shapes, and incoming/outgoing section references.

comments.author: Milky2018
comments.text: Extended graph model state for direct parity needs in content assist: added layout-option string storage for ports/edges and exposed edge/port set/get helpers for option-by-id values. This unblocks graph-element-aware option-assigned filtering in core content assist path.

comments.author: Milky2018
comments.text: Added minimal ElkLabel model primitives in elk_graph_model.mbt for graph parity work: ElkLabel type, ElkLabelParent union (+ public constructor helpers), create_label/label_parent, and label layout-option string storage accessors.

comments.author: Milky2018
comments.text: Extended elk_graph_model.mbt for direct label metadata support used by upcoming algorithm ports: LabelData now stores text; added label_set_text/label_text plus parent-scoped label queries node_labels/edge_labels/port_labels. This enables import paths (e.g., force importer) to consume node and edge labels directly from graph model.

comments.author: Milky2018
comments.text: 2026-02-10: Extended graph model APIs needed by translated nodespacing tests and upcoming algorithm ports: added node_ports, all_edges, port_incoming_edges, port_outgoing_edges, node_incoming_edges, and node_outgoing_edges in elk_graph_model.mbt. Full moon test suite remains green after change.

title: Port package: org.eclipse.elk.graph.json
description: 1:1 direct port for org.eclipse.elk.graph.json from elk-reference/plugins/org.eclipse.elk.graph.json. Translate source and keep behavior parity.
notes:
2026-02-08: Started direct port of org.eclipse.elk.graph.json. Added ElkGraphJson import builder baseline with ID validation behavior aligned to upstream IdTest cases (missing/wrong id type rejected; string/int accepted).
2026-02-09: Expanded direct port baseline for org.eclipse.elk.graph.json with test-first workflow. Added importer/exporter builder APIs, lenient JSON parsing path (comments/single quotes/unquoted keys/semicolon), node+edge transformation for primitive/extended edge forms, legacy properties+layoutOptions precedence handling, and export path with unique ID generation + unknown option filtering. Added MoonBit tests covering GraphTest/EdgesTest/LayoutOptionsTest equivalents (graph_json_graph_test.mbt, graph_json_edges_test.mbt, graph_json_layout_options_test.mbt, graph_json_test_support_test.mbt). Full suite green: moon test 140/140.
2026-02-09: Further parity expansion: added ExportTest/TransferLayoutTest-equivalent cases (graph_json_export_test.mbt, graph_json_transfer_layout_test.mbt) covering unique ID suffix generation, monotonic generated IDs, port-less edge export, empty sections omission, importer remember/transfer layout success path, and transfer failure when graph is mutated after import. Suite now 146/146 passing.
2026-02-09: Added direct-translation support for edge sections in graph model/json importer path (section ids, start/end points, incoming/outgoing shape refs, incoming/outgoing section refs, single-section default shape linking). Extended transferLayout to serialize modeled sections only (no synthetic empty sections), preserving imported section IDs. Added graph_json_sections_test.mbt with SectionsTest-equivalent coverage; full suite now 150/150 passing.
2026-02-09: Added TransferLayout edge-section existence parity case (graph_json_transfer_layout_test.mbt): after recursive layout + transfer, children get positive coordinates, edges include sections with id/start/end, and container field is present.

comments.author: Milky2018
comments.text: Progress: ported all org.eclipse.elk.alg.disco.debug files into MoonBit counterparts with tests-first workflow. Added direct ports for State, BaseGridVisibility, ConfigState, DisCoGraphRenderingConfigurator, DisCoGraphRenderingFillPatterns, DisCoGraphRenderingCanvas, DisCoDebugView, SelectivePaintToggleAction, DropdownIntRangeAction, DisCoImageExportAction, and DisCoDebugPlugin. Added focused tests: config/rendering/enums/actions/plugin/export. Quality gates passed: moon test (291/291), moon check, moon info, moon fmt. Remaining gap: DisCoGraphRenderer is currently a structural and behavior-safe skeleton, not yet full line-by-line parity with upstream 1250-line renderer internals; keep issue in progress for full renderer parity.

comments.author: Milky2018
comments.text: Landed commit 87e7931 on main and pushed to origin. Added debug package files + tests with passing gates. Task remains in_progress pending full line-by-line DisCoGraphRenderer parity work.

comments.author: Milky2018
comments.text: Progress: tightened DisCoGraphRenderer parity against upstream Java by replacing placeholder edge-arrow logic with section-endpoint geometry, adding true polygon-vs-rectangle intersection (point-in-polygon + segment intersection), and extending renderer tests with a concave-polygon dirty-region regression. Also fixed MoonBit API drift (math hypot, generic fn syntax, map.length) and imported @cmp in moon.pkg.

comments.author: Milky2018
comments.text: Landed and pushed commit 2b0e589 on main. Renderer now uses real edge-section arrow geometry and polygon-rectangle intersection instead of bbox-only approximation; added concave dirty-region regression test. Verified with moon check, moon test (296/296), moon info, moon fmt.

comments.author: Milky2018
comments.text: Ported org.eclipse.elk.alg.force.test/ForceImportTest to MoonBit as alg_force_force_import_test.mbt with direct test scenarios: import simple graph, split connected components, and do-not-split path. Added minimal direct force runtime subset needed by the test: force options (separateConnectedComponents), force graph model (FGraph/FNode/FEdge/FLabel), ElkGraphImporter, and ComponentsProcessor split DFS. Also extended elk graph model with label text and parent-label queries (node_labels/edge_labels/port_labels) required by importer. Validation: moon check pass; moon test pass (185/185).

title: Port package: org.eclipse.elk.alg.force
description: 1:1 direct port for org.eclipse.elk.alg.force from elk-reference/plugins/org.eclipse.elk.alg.force. Translate source and keep behavior parity.

comments.author: Milky2018
comments.text: Started direct transliteration for org.eclipse.elk.alg.force package to support upstream ForceImportTest behavior. Added initial MoonBit files: alg_force_options_force_options.mbt (SEPARATE_CONNECTED_COMPONENTS option), alg_force_graph_model.mbt (FGraph/FNode/FEdge/FLabel), alg_force_elk_graph_importer.mbt (ElkNode->FGraph import path with edge-label transfer), and alg_force_components_processor.mbt (connected-components split DFS and id redistribution). This is a partial package port; remaining force classes/models/providers still pending.

comments.author: Milky2018
comments.text: Continued package-structure parity for org.eclipse.elk.alg.force: added IGraphImporter abstraction (alg_force_igraph_importer.mbt), ForceModelStrategy enum (alg_force_options_force_model_strategy.mbt), and InternalProperties identifiers (alg_force_options_internal_properties.mbt). ElkGraphImporter now exposes import_graph/apply_layout and adapter conversion to IGraphImporter. Validation after these additions: moon check pass; moon test pass (185/185).

comments.author: Milky2018
comments.text: Expanded force graph core translation toward upstream FParticle semantics in alg_force_graph_model.mbt: added bendpoint type/store, per-particle vectors (displacement/position/size) for nodes/labels/bendpoints, radius helpers, edge source/target docking point calculation, edge-to-vector-chain conversion, and bendpoint distribution. FGraph now tracks bendpoints as well. Validation after update: moon check pass; moon test pass (185/185).

comments.author: Milky2018
comments.text: Continued 1:1 direct transliteration for org.eclipse.elk.alg.force. Added missing force runtime chain: alg_force_math_utils.mbt, alg_force_model_abstract_force_model.mbt, alg_force_model_eades_model.mbt, alg_force_model_fruchterman_reingold_model.mbt, alg_force_force_layout_provider.mbt. Expanded alg_force_graph_model.mbt with typed option/internal property storage, particle abstraction, adjacency matrix, node/edge/label origin mapping, label placement refresh, and generic graph property maps. Ported ComponentsProcessor.recombine and completed ElkGraphImporter.apply_layout behavior including node relocation and edge section routing. Extended elk_graph_model label geometry API (label_set_location/label_set_dimensions/label_x/y/width/height). Added alg_force_model_test.mbt with model constants/layout/recombine coverage. Validation now green: moon check pass, moon test pass (190/190), moon info && moon fmt pass.

comments.author: Milky2018
comments.text: Continued direct transliteration for org.eclipse.elk.alg.force with stress branch fully buildable. Synced apply-layout behavior closer to upstream ElkGraphImporter: respect org.eclipse.elk.nodeSize.fixedGraphSize and always set child area width/height outputs. Added core options child_area_width/child_area_height/node_size_fixed_graph_size and new tests in alg_force_force_import_test.mbt covering parent resize + fixed graph size behavior. Updated force random seed handling to map seed=0 to non-deterministic generator and non-zero seeds to deterministic seeded generator. Aligned recombination behavior with upstream by no longer copying bendpoint list entries during moveGraph. Validation: moon check pass, moon test pass (194/194), moon info && moon fmt pass.

comments.author: Milky2018
comments.text: Continued org.eclipse.elk.alg.force 1:1 transliteration by aligning ElkGraphImporter property-copy semantics with upstream copyProperties behavior. Added layout-option import for graph/node/edge/label scopes (including force model, iterations/random seed, stress dimension/epsilon/iteration limit/desired edge length, padding, priorities, stress.fixed, edge label inline inheritance, and edge-level desiredEdgeLength explicit-override semantics). Added regression coverage in alg_force_force_import_test.mbt for graph option import, element option propagation, desiredEdgeLength override-only behavior, and edgeLabels.inline inheritance. Validation: moon check pass, moon test pass (298/298), moon info && moon fmt pass.

comments.author: Milky2018
comments.text: Added direct MoonBit translations of ELK force metadata providers: ForceMetaDataProvider and StressMetaDataProvider semantics are now represented in alg_force_options_meta_data_provider.mbt, including algorithm/category registration, custom option metadata registration, and option-support defaults for org.eclipse.elk.force and org.eclipse.elk.stress. Added regression coverage in alg_force_options_meta_data_provider_test.mbt to verify provider registration of algorithms/category and option metadata type/target behavior. Validation after this change: moon check pass, moon test pass (300/300), moon info && moon fmt pass.

title: Port tests: org.eclipse.elk.core.test
description: Port upstream tests from elk-reference/test/org.eclipse.elk.core.test and align behavior to upstream package semantics.
notes:
2026-02-08: Ported org.eclipse.elk.core.math test suite to MoonBit (KVector, KVectorChain, ElkMath, BezierSpline, CubicSplineInterpolator tests).
2026-02-08: Ported org.eclipse.elk.core.alg test suites AlgorithmAssemblerTest and LayoutProcessorConfigurationTest with TestPhases/TestProcessors fixtures (MoonBit direct translation). SpacingConfigurationTest intentionally deferred until graph/options/util dependencies are fully ported. Tests passing (86/86 total).
2026-02-08: Ported SpacingConfigurationTest and ElkUtil translateWithContentAlignment test to MoonBit. Core.alg test coverage now includes AlgorithmAssembler, LayoutProcessorConfiguration, and spacing utility behavior. Total local tests passing: 100/100.
2026-02-08: Added tests for core.data DeprecatedLayoutOptionReplacer and core.util ElkUtil translateWithContentAlignment semantics. Total local tests now 102/102 passing.
2026-02-08: Ported additional org.eclipse.elk.core.test suites with test-first workflow: LayoutConfiguratorTest, RecursiveGraphLayoutEngineTest, GraphValidatorTest, LayoutOptionValidatorTest (MoonBit direct translation behavior). Total local tests now 115/115 passing after moon info && moon fmt.
2026-02-08: Ported PropertyTest semantics (graph/properties in core.test scope) via graph_properties_property_test.mbt. Added clone-required property behavior and panic-on-unknown-clone path; tests are green in full suite.

comments.author: Milky2018
comments.text: Ported and added core options behavior tests in core_options_enums_test.mbt to validate direct-translation semantics for direction, port constraints, port side, node/port label placement validity, and size option/constraint helpers. moon test now passes with 157/157.

comments.author: Milky2018
comments.text: Added core_data_layout_meta_data_service_test.mbt to verify default option registration for algorithm/portConstraints/nodeSize.constraints/expandNodes option metadata. Current verification: moon test => 158 passed, 0 failed.

comments.author: Milky2018
comments.text: Extended core_data_layout_meta_data_service_test.mbt with suffix-lookup and collection-exposure tests for metadata service. Validation state after update: moon check pass; moon test pass (160/160).

comments.author: Milky2018
comments.text: Ported additional LayoutDataContentAssistTest coverage from upstream core.test: node id/name prefixes (including empty prefix), edge priority prefix, port-side prefix, parent-vs-child target behavior, algorithm-specific known/unknown option filtering (box vs fixed), group-preserving proposal text, and algorithm suffix proposals. Full suite status after update: moon test => 167 passed, 0 failed.

comments.author: Milky2018
comments.text: Added label-prefix coverage to content assist tests: node/edge/port/label proposals now validated in one suite, including nodeLabels.placement matching on labels. Verification after update: moon check pass; moon test pass (167/167).

comments.author: Milky2018
comments.text: Added metadata-service category test coverage in core_data_layout_meta_data_service_test.mbt. Current verification state after this increment: moon check pass; moon test pass (168/168).

comments.author: Milky2018
comments.text: Added core test coverage for newly ported core APIs: abstract provider + graph engine lifecycle forwarding, topdown provider prediction, graph validation exception/validating visitor issue exposure, unsupported exception payloads, wrapped exception payloads, exclusive bounds compare semantics, and spline interpolator adapter behavior. Current validation: moon test => 178 passed, 0 failed.

comments.author: Milky2018
comments.text: Added dedicated tests for NullElkProgressMonitor behavior and regular-monitor non-regression in core_util_null_elk_progress_monitor_test.mbt. Post-update validation: moon check pass; moon test pass (180/180).

comments.author: Milky2018
comments.text: Added force import test coverage from org.eclipse.elk.alg.force.test as alg_force_force_import_test.mbt (simple import, split components, no-split path). Current full-suite validation after this increment: moon check pass; moon test pass (185/185).

title: Port package: org.eclipse.elk.alg.graphviz.dot
description: 1:1 direct port for org.eclipse.elk.alg.graphviz.dot from elk-reference/plugins/org.eclipse.elk.alg.graphviz.dot. Translate source and keep behavior parity.
notes:
Completed graphviz.dot base translation slice: transform enums/constants/data + dot model/factory/resource-set-provider with test-first coverage. Added alg_graphviz_dot_transform_* and alg_graphviz_dot_dot_model* tests; moon check and moon test (309/309) pass.
Completed DotExporter helper slice (test-first): added alg_graphviz_dot_transform_dot_exporter.mbt and alg_graphviz_dot_transform_dot_exporter_test.mbt. Ported createAttribute overloads, createString escaping, createAttributeMap, parseSplinePoints, setGeneralNode/EdgeAttributes, isInsideGraph, and setEdgeLabels (placement/font/spacing behavior). moon check, moon test, moon info && moon fmt all pass.
Completed DotExporter main-flow direct port slice: added graph element property storage in DotTransformationData, completed DotExporter transform/transformNodes/transformEdges with hierarchy offsets and edge pos export, and direct-port transfer_layout/apply_layout/apply_node_layout/apply_edge_layout/apply_edge_label_pos pipeline. Added/updated tests in alg_graphviz_dot_transform_base_test.mbt and alg_graphviz_dot_transform_dot_exporter_test.mbt (including transfer_layout and edge-pos cases). Validation: moon test alg_graphviz_dot_transform_dot_exporter_test.mbt, moon test alg_graphviz_dot_transform_base_test.mbt, moon check, moon info && moon fmt, moon test (323/323 pass).
Added direct-port DotImporter slice: new alg_graphviz_dot_transform_dot_importer.mbt with Dot->Elk transform, defaults handling, node/edge/cluster import, and Elk->Dot transfer_layout write-back for node/edge/label geometry; plus new alg_graphviz_dot_transform_dot_importer_test.mbt covering transform and transfer_layout behavior. Validation: moon test alg_graphviz_dot_transform_dot_importer_test.mbt, moon test alg_graphviz_dot_transform_dot_exporter_test.mbt, moon check, moon test (325/325), moon info && moon fmt.
Added direct-port infrastructure slice for org.eclipse.elk.alg.graphviz.dot source classes: GraphvizDotActivator, GraphvizDotRuntimeModule, GraphvizDotExecutableExtensionFactory, GraphvizDotStandaloneSetup(+Generated), GraphvizDotSerializer, GraphvizDotSemanticSequencer, GraphvizDotSyntacticSequencer. Added coverage in alg_graphviz_dot_graphviz_dot_runtime_test.mbt (activator lifecycle/cache, runtime serializer binding, serializer line-width config, standalone setup registration, syntactic/semantic sequencer behavior, executable extension factory creation/init). Validation run: moon check; moon test alg_graphviz_dot_graphviz_dot_runtime_test.mbt; moon info && moon fmt && moon test (333/333 pass).
Completed src-gen parser/runtime generated slice for graphviz.dot: added direct-port files alg_graphviz_dot_abstract_graphviz_dot_runtime_module.mbt, alg_graphviz_dot_services_graphviz_dot_grammar_access.mbt, alg_graphviz_dot_parser_antlr_graphviz_dot_antlr_token_file_provider.mbt, alg_graphviz_dot_parser_antlr_graphviz_dot_parser.mbt, alg_graphviz_dot_parser_antlr_internal_internal_graphviz_dot_lexer.mbt, alg_graphviz_dot_parser_antlr_internal_internal_graphviz_dot_parser.mbt; added coverage in alg_graphviz_dot_generated_parser_test.mbt (runtime bindings, grammar access, token provider, lexer, internal parser, parser wiring). Validation: moon check; moon test alg_graphviz_dot_generated_parser_test.mbt; moon info && moon fmt; moon test (339/339).
Completed follow-up src-gen serializer abstraction slice for graphviz.dot: added alg_graphviz_dot_serializer_abstract_graphviz_dot_semantic_sequencer.mbt and alg_graphviz_dot_serializer_abstract_graphviz_dot_syntactic_sequencer.mbt; wired concrete sequencers to abstract bases; extended runtime tests for bracket-group ambiguous syntaxes and abstract sequencer defaults. Validation: moon check; moon test alg_graphviz_dot_graphviz_dot_runtime_test.mbt; moon test alg_graphviz_dot_generated_parser_test.mbt; moon info && moon fmt && moon test (341/341).
